chunks.text: Chamath and Jason welcome Rep. Ro Khanna!
Giving Trump credit as a Progressive Democrat, why bipartisanship is broken, future Democratic leaders
Tech industry: Can Democrats win back tech?; Economic patriotism, protection vs proliferation of AI
Extreme rhetoric: Importance of dialing this down
Censorship and lawfare on both sides
Crime issues in major cities, why Democrats are losing on safety, common sense solutions
Mamdani's surge: is Zohran the future of the party?
